rulings.Case Title: IN RE; FRANK L. WONG 1990 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions; Or For Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Admission And Interrogatories; Points Authorities; Spalding Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Dillon Wong's unopposed motion for order establishing admissions and sanctions and for an order compelling responses to requests for admission and companion form interrogatory 17.1 is GRANTED. The untimely, unverified responses are not in substantial compliance with the requirements of CCP Section 2033.220. Dillon is awarded $1,462.50 in sanctions. Dillon's counsel must submit a proposed order deeming admitted the requests for admissions (1-32) and the proposed sanctions amount. Any party choosing to contest must notify the court no later than December 30, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
